description_long: This is a modern swivel chair featuring a high backrest with a headrest, both upholstered in black cushioning for ergonomic support. The seat and back are framed with a curved wooden shell, giving it a mid-century aesthetic. The chair is equipped with black armrests and a five-star metal base with casters for mobility. The central support column is metallic and likely adjustable, supporting the seat and allowing for rotation. The rear view reveals metal brackets attaching the backrest to the seat, and the overall construction suggests a blend of comfort and durability. The materials and design make it suitable for office or executive settings in urban environments.
description: A high-back, black cushioned swivel chair with a curved wooden shell, armrests, and a five-star wheeled metal base. It combines ergonomic comfort with a stylish, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black cushioned headrest, backrest, seat, and armrests framed by a wooden shell.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's profile, the thickness of the cushioning, and the curvature of the wooden shell.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden back, metal support brackets, and the five-star base with casters.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the armrest and the ergonomic contour of the backrest.
attribute_central_support_column: A black metal cylindrical column, likely telescoping for height adjustment, connecting the seat to the five-star wheeled base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular backrest with a separate headrest, both padded and upholstered in black material, framed by a curved wooden shell with visible metal brackets on the rear.
attribute_armrest_style: Present; straight, padded black armrests attached to the wooden seat frame, extending horizontally with a modern, minimalist design.
